title: To Anatolius, Bishop of Constantinople. By Patritius the Deacon the Deacon.

source.title: NPNF-212. Leo the Great, Gregory the Great

verses.text: (Glorying over the harshness of his former letter, to which Anatolius had objected, but persisting that he is not satisfied with the explanation Atticus had furnished of his orthodoxy.)
